scripts.build: prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && next build
scripts.build:analyze: prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && ANALYZE=1 next build
scripts._comment_lighthouse: requires a fresh `npm run build` first; uses `.lighthouserc.json` budgets
scripts._comment_test: requires Node 22+ for stable type-stripping; Node 25 needs no flag
scripts.test: node --import ./src/test-setup/register-loader.mjs --test --experimental-strip-types src/lib/mentora/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/community/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/auth/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/email/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/images/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/storage/__tests__/*.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: node --import ./src/test-setup/register-loader.mjs --test --experimental-strip-types --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-exclude=**/__tests__/** --test-coverage-exclude=**/node_modules/** src/lib/mentora/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/community/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/auth/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/email/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/images/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/storage/__tests__/*.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage:lcov: node --import ./src/test-setup/register-loader.mjs --test --experimental-strip-types --experimental-test-coverage --test-reporter=lcov --test-reporter-destination=coverage/lcov.info --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-coverage-exclude=**/__tests__/** --test-coverage-exclude=**/node_modules/** src/lib/mentora/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/community/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/auth/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/email/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/images/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/storage/__tests__/*.test.ts
